case_title: ALICE LAU VS. CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-02-2012 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-02-2012 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS REPRESENTED BY ANNIE LIU--CANTONESE INTERPRETER. APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
RETURNED MAIL: PLAINTIFF CLAIM MAILED TO CCSF RETURNED.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-05-2012 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TO MAY-02-2012 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-02-2012 - JUDGMENT.
ORDER ON REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING GRANTED, PER JUDGE DONALD S. MITCHELL.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY LAU, ALICE AS TO DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-05-2012 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF LAU, ALICE AS TO DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 35.00 - SERVED MAR-15-2012, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO
REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING FILED BY DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LAU, ALICE IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
